programme.title: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes the four remaining culinary hopefuls for two epic semifinal battles; the last two chefs go head-to-head in the championship showdown, and only one chef will claim the Tournament of Champions VII belt, the coveted title, and $150,000.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cranks up the chaos as the returning champ faces off against chefs Hanna Haar and Gustavo Romero in a nut-fueled challenge; standing between them and victory are judges Lee Anne Wong and Eric Greenspan, who are ready to scrutinize every bite.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes the four remaining culinary hopefuls for two epic semifinal battles; the last two chefs go head-to-head in the championship showdown, and only one chef will claim the Tournament of Champions VII belt, the coveted title, and $150,000.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges the competitors to leave the plates behind and serve everything in a bowl; the returning champion takes on chefs Martel Stone and Evelyn Garcia to win over judges Antonia Lofaso and Aaron May in Flavortown's fiercest competition yet.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites four chefs to participate in the first cheat day, challenging them to make dishes worth splurging on after a week of eating healthy; the chefs count pounds and use specific ingredients in their deep-fried and mega-melty dishes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl
programme.sub-title: Flay V. Chauhan V. Lofaso: Into the Fire!
programme.desc: In the advantage challenge, team captains Bobby Flay, Maneet Chauhan and Antonia Lofaso go primal, cooking dishes straight in the coals; the Brawlers craft massive, meaty rib feasts on Argentinian asado iron crosses for the team brawl.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: BBQ Brawl
programme.sub-title: Flay V. Chauhan V. Lofaso: BBQ Duels
programme.desc: Bobby Flay, Maneet Chauhan and Antonia Lofaso cheer on the final five Brawlers as they compete head-to-head in two knockout duels; three competitors make it through, but waiting at the finish line is a game-changing surprise that no one sees coming.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Four new chefs are thrown into the mix as they try to transform a hearty sandwich into a dainty appetizer; in the second round, the competitors must make creative, beautiful entrees with weird soda and quail.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Four brave chefs prioritize flavor over fear as they take on outrageously daring ingredients to make killer dishes for the judges; the chefs prove they have the chops to make a swamp-loving chomper tasty and try not be be stung by a shocking sweet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Four brave chefs take on a cheese that won't melt and a clock that won't stop in the appetizer round; the chefs step it up in the entrée round with camel tenderloin before tackling a layered sweet and a tart berry in the dessert round.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: The chef who cracks the code on this special competition's egg-centric baskets will win $10,000! Delicate eggs and smoked seafood are part of the appetizer round challenge, and the finalists find a giant egg in the dessert basket.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Chef Michelle Wallace feels like the underdog against Bobby Flay's Titans, but she's here to prove her down-home Southern flavors can compete with anyone to win $25,000; Katie Lee Biegel, star of "The Kitchen," determines the winner.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Iron Chef Jose Garces keeps Bobby Flay's Titans on their toes in three rounds of flavor-packed cooking; using his unmatched strategy, Jose shocks Brooke Williamson with his Round 3 ingredients, but Brooke won't trot away from the challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Chef Shirley Chung has a bone to pick with Bobby Flay's Titans, especially her former roommate, Brooke Williamson; while Shirley's intimate knowledge could lead to their downfall, Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian's judging keeps everyone on their toes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Heavy hitting chef Jonathon Sawyer fights for his life against Bobby Flay's Titans; one chef risks it all by making pasta for legendary Italian chef and judge Nancy Silverton.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: The winds of fortune are blowing for Toronto's David Adjey and Chicago's Cory Morris; it's up to "Chopped" judge Scott Conant and Internet star Hannah Hart to decide who will go up against Bobby Flay.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's former co-worker Leia Gaccione and Asian expert Tony Nguyen return to the arena for a second chance to take Bobby down; Food Network's Scott Conant and internet superstar Laura Vitale choose who gets a shot at redemption.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Anne Burrell and Patti LaBelle champion two former "Food Network Star" competitors, Viet Pham and Dom Tesoriero, as they fight for the chance to go head-to-head with their former mentor, Bobby Flay.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Derek Hough of "Dancing With the Stars" and food personality Carla Hall decide who to whisk up to compete against Bobby Flay; doughnut queen Katy Gerdes and French-trained chef Olivier Palazzo meet in a sweet culinary cook-off.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.sub-title: They Had Style, They Had Food, They Were There!
programme.desc: Actress Fran Drescher joins Scott Conant from "Chopped" to beat Bobby Flay with style, food and flair; they're upping the ante by bringing in two fantastic pastry chefs, Jessica Scott and Shelby Sieg, who are ready to bake Bobby into a corner.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Chef Scott Conant and host Katie Brown bring in two masters of Italian pasta making to see if Bobby Flay's skills can stand up to the test; chefs Kerri Rogers and Joel Gargano's buon cibo.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Bobby Flay tries to make chefs Raymond Yaptinchay and Cara Stadler go nuts in the kitchen. Michael Voltaggio and actress Morena Baccarin are there to cheer them on to victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Food Network's Jet Tila and chef Carla Hall hope to get sweet revenge over Bobby Flay; they bring in Asian food specialists chef Dan Jacobs and chef Tony Nguyen to dodge Bobby's curveballs and take home a win.

programme.desc: Eddie Jackson and Gigi Hadid give Bobby Flay fashion advice; chefs Maya Erickson and Jason Smith prove they're pastry pros.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: The victorious Super 16 return to the arena, and Guy Fieri kicks off the second round of competition with four matchups; turning up the difficulty of the randomizer in this round.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer tasks the bakers with creating a visually stunning chocolate sculptural piece along with a complementary baked element; chocolatier Amaury Guichon joins Duff Goldman to judge the chefs' technical precision and creative storytelling.

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer challenges the chefs to craft a large-format dessert with a decorative sugar element that embodies their assigned element, earth, air, fire, water, or space; Duff Goldman and Jacques Torres judge the striking sugar showpieces.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy has the chefs turn the ingredients from an old-fashioned Waldorf salad into a modern meal; to help the rising chefs reach the pinnacle of success, the towering Food Pyramid determines the details of its best international dinner.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Four carnival food-loving chefs play carnival classics; Guy turns a popular strength test game into a finesse challenge; a simple game of ring toss determines the main protein for the chefs' best dish on a stick.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Chefs cook their best regional sandwich, but on a budget; creating seafood dishes using ingredients from around the market; Guy's food wheel decides where the remaining two chefs get to shop for their regional comfort food dishes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy gives four chefs a list of sale items they have to use over the course of the competition, with all of the required ingredients while making a high-end dinner in the first round.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: The chefs battle with their budgets to make their best burger and side and race the clock to make an Asian takeout staple; the final challenge is a Mexican takeout-style dinner.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri returns to some of his favorite diners; an old-school Atlanta spot is serving Southern comfort with mighty mac 'n cheese, a San Antonio staple is dishing out brisket hash; an eatery in Scottsdale is plating a supreme breakfast burrito.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, short rib tacos and spicy pork chimichangas; in L.A.'s Chinatown, Big Easy po' boys and crawfish mac and cheese; in Charlotte, N.C., calzones and a stuffed cabbage specialty.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's flying with chicken and so much more; in Santa Barbara, Calif., a butcher is saucing up chicken tacos; in Delray Beach, Fla., an homage to Mom includes a mouthwatering pasta; in Las Vegas, a chef is going over the top with Thai creations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into chicken, noodles and more; an Omaha joint is going big with pasta and cheese, a champion chef in Los Angeles is prepping for a Nashville-Chinese mashup and an Italian spot in Greenwich, Conn., is putting out elevated dishes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's getting into mega Mexican, mac 'n' cheese and prime-time pie; there's lights-out Latin in Chicago putting an upscale spin on shrimp empanadas and the-bomb birria grilled cheese.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is loading up on all kinds of Latin on this trip; in Logan, Utah, a Salvadoran spot puttin' out pupusas and a cabeza creation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Waffles in Anchorage, Alaska, and steak tacos in Aspen, Colo.; in Albuquerque, N.M., a Latin place makes repas and pork paninis.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy's hitting up a taco joint going above and beyond with their Ahogada Torta and a quesadilla-taco-au jus mashup; a Thai spot is piling up the pork and dynamite dumplings; a funky food truck is loading up monster sandwiches.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Garland, a century-old staple serving up tasty sandwiches and a sweet treat; in Oklahoma City, a local landmark is dishing out Southern specialties, and in Denver, a spot putting a healthy spin on classic comfort foods.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Fargo, N.D., a funky place is piling barbecue onto mac and heating up wings; a Mexican joint in Parkland, Fla., is pumping out righteous recipes inside a gas station; a scratch-made spot servin' up hearty home cooking in Philadelphia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into killer culinary and cocktails; in San Antonio, TX, a Mexican spot is going over-the-top with scratch-made torta ahogada; a funky spot in Brunswick, GA, is serving up fried chicken and creative cocktails in a hidden speakeasy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: A stacked-up breakfast, unique pot pie and Mexican recipes not found on a typical menu in Taos, N.M.; skate legend Tony Hawk tags along for creative vegan cooking in San Diego.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going for amped-up pork tacos in Sacramento, CA, and a BBQ joint in Palm Beach Gardens, FL, is bringing brisket to a stacked sloppy joe. Plus, a real-deal Cambodian spot in San Jose, CA, is serving primo pork belly noodles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabs big-deal eats; smoking smash burgers at a whisky joint in East Boston; a Minneapolis spot serves up flavor bursting bone marrow; a GGG alumnus dishes out the bomb Bengali-American fare in Ohio.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: An uncle-nephew duo is changing the game in Gainesville, Fla., with a fried chicken sandwich; there's Mexican gone vegan in Dallas, Texas; a spot in Baton Rouge, LA, is putting their stamp on pot pie.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into meaty mashups, starting in Boise, Idaho, where a Russian joint is serving lights-out lamb, and a Pakistani spot is cooking goat; in Ocala, Fla., a barbecue pro is putting his spin on brisket mac and cheese stuffed sausage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into dishes that begin with great dough; starting with savory venison sopes in Minneapolis; in Missoula, MT, a pizza spot is slinging artisan pies like meatball verde; a funky joint is serving up vegan doughnuts.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.sub-title: Triple D Nation: Around the World and Off-The-Hook
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's heading back for some global grub, starting with Thai in Phoenix, Ariz.; a Syracuse, N.Y., spot is still serving up legit Lebanese; Triple-D's first Druze restaurant is thriving in New York City.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
